Notes: Maggie Farrell was 10-10 from the line and grabbed 10 rebounds. Artie Williams
scored 12 points and Nicole Sarcone dished out nine assists and netted 11
points. Hannah Fairchild led Potsdam with 18 points.
Game.Officials: Donald Cooper,  Henry Boldrin Jr.,  Carlos Alvarez
